textPlain: > As part of my ongoing project to reimplement Django’s templating language in Rust, I have been adding support for custom template tags.Cool project, but does the author know about minijinja [1]?[1] https://github.com/mitsuhiko/minijinja

There is little chance they don't know about minijinja/askama/tera/etc.The repo for their project outlines why they're doing this, though: https://github.com/LilyAcorn/django-rusty-templatesIt's seemingly being made for being used in Django as a template backend, not necessarily for use from Rust like the others (i.e native-ifying Django templates).
